text: Artificial intelligence is becoming a bigger part of our daily lives, making many decisions for us. This raises important ethical questions. One major issue is **bias**: if an AI is trained on biased data, it can make unfair decisions, such as in hiring or lending. Ensuring **fairness** means we must check that these systems treat all people equally. **Privacy** is also a concern, as AI often collects large amounts of personal data. To build trust, we need **transparency** so that people understand how AI reaches its conclusions. Ultimately, **responsible AI development** requires designers, companies, and governments to work together to create technology that benefits everyone while minimizing harm.
